name: player_season_projected_points single year_offset returns the offset-year in-query score (executed-result parity)
description: Seed one player with distinct 2024 (py 250, tdp 2) and 2025 (py 300) projections_index rows, then run player_season_projected_points with year=[2023] + year_offset=[1]. The executed value must equal the in-query draftkings score of the 2024 row (250*0.04 + 2*4 = 18.00), proving the single offset shifts the join year and the points are computed in-query (NOT read from the precomputed scoring_format_player_projection_points total).
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, ROUND((COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."pa", 0) * 0 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."pc", 0) * 0 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."py", 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."ints", 0) * -1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."tdp", 0) * 4 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."ra", 0) * 0 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."ry", 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."tdr", 0) * 6 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."fuml", 0) * -1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."trg", 0) * 0 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."rec", 0) * 1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."recy", 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."tdrec", 0) * 6 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."twoptc", 0) * 2 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."prtd", 0) * 6 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."krtd", 0) * 6 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."xpm", 0) * 1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."fg19", 0) * 3 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."fg29", 0) * 3 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."fg39", 0) * 3 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."fg49", 0) * 4 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."fg50", 0) * 5 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."dsk", 0) * 1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."dint", 0) * 2 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."dff", 0) * 1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."drf", 0) * 1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."dtno", 0) * 1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."dfds", 0) * 1 + GREATEST(COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."dpa", 0) - 20, 0) * -0.4 + GREATEST(COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."dya", 0) - 300, 0) * -0.02 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."dblk", 0) * 3 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."dsf", 0) * 2 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."dtpr", 0) * 2 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."dtd", 0) * 6), 2) AS "season_projected_points_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "projections_index" as "tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a" on "tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."year" = 2024 and "tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."week" = '0' and "tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."sourceid" = 18 and "tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."seas_type" = 'REG' where player.pos IN ('ZZ') group by player.fname, player.lname, ROUND((COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."pa", 0) * 0 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."rec", 0) * 1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."recy", 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."tdrec", 0) * 6 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."twoptc", 0) * 2 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."prtd", 0) * 6 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."krtd", 0) * 6 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."xpm", 0) * 1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."fg19", 0) * 3 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."fg29", 0) * 3 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."fg39", 0) * 3 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."fg49", 0) * 4 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."fg50", 0) * 5 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."dsk", 0) * 1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."dint", 0) * 2 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."dff", 0) * 1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."drf", 0) * 1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."dtno", 0) * 1 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."dfds", 0) * 1 + GREATEST(COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."dpa", 0) - 20, 0) * -0.4 + GREATEST(COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."dya", 0) - 300, 0) * -0.02 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."dblk", 0) * 3 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."dsf", 0) * 2 + COALESCE("tfa9ad4fefaaff6fc46749bf31097437a"."dtpr", 0) * 2 + seed: INSERT INTO player (pid, fname, lname, pname, formatted, pos, pos1, dob, nfl_draft_year) VALUES ('TEST-PROJ-2000-2000-01-01', 'Test', 'Proj', 'T.Proj', 'Test Proj', 'ZZ', 'ZZ', '2000-01-01', 2020)
INSERT INTO projections_index (pid, sourceid, week, year, seas_type, py, tdp) VALUES ('TEST-PROJ-2000-2000-01-01', 18, 0, 2024, 'REG', 250, 2)
INSERT INTO projections_index (pid, sourceid, week, year, seas_type, py, tdp) VALUES ('TEST-PROJ-2000-2000-01-01', 18, 0, 2025, 'REG', 300, 0)
result_equivalence.reference_sql: SELECT ROUND(py * 0.04 + tdp * 4, 2) AS season_projected_points_0 FROM projections_index WHERE pid = 'TEST-PROJ-2000-2000-01-01' AND year = 2024 AND sourceid = 18 AND week = 0 AND seas_type = 'REG'
